message:
test(conformance): Add trace viewer CLI test and session fork planning tests

Extension conformance tests (tests/ext_conformance.rs):

- trace_viewer_renders_pretty_and_exports_jsonl: End-to-end test for the
  new --view-log feature in pi_legacy_capture binary
  - Creates temp JSONL file with 3 log entries (info, debug, error levels)
  - Verifies pretty mode renders human-readable output (insta snapshot)
  - Verifies jsonl mode passes through matching records unchanged
  - Tests --view-min-level filtering
  - Uses CARGO_BIN_EXE_pi_legacy_capture for binary path resolution

Session conformance tests (tests/session_conformance.rs):

- plan_fork_from_user_message_branches_from_parent_and_returns_selected_text:
  Tests the core fork planning logic:
  - Verifies selected_text contains the user message content
  - Verifies leaf_id points to the parent (assistant) message
  - Verifies entries contains the path up to the fork point
  - Verifies a forked session can append messages with correct parent linkage

- plan_fork_from_root_user_message_creates_empty_session:
  Tests edge case where fork target is the first user message:
  - Verifies entries is empty (no history to copy)
  - Verifies leaf_id is None (fresh session root)
  - Verifies selected_text is still returned for editor pre-fill

- plan_fork_from_non_user_message_errors:
  Tests error handling when fork target is an assistant message:
  - Verifies Error::Session is returned
  - Ensures only user messages can be fork points

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
